_meta.purpose: Roster of named sub-agent characters used by MC agents when delegating tasks. The agent picks a random name AND a random reason and pairs them — pairing is NOT fixed.

reasons: they've been staring out the window all morning.
they've had four coffee breaks already.
they keep saying they're underpaid.
they've been on hold with IT for three hours.
they just got back from a long lunch.
before they demand a manager again.
they've been refreshing their inbox all morning.
they've nearly finished a second scarf today.
if I can wake them up in the breakroom.
they're mid-Solitaire under a spreadsheet.
they're well overdue for actual work.
they're done handing out muffins.
they just finalised their fantasy football lineup.
they're bouncing off the walls today.
their three monitors are doing nothing.
they've reorganised their drawer five times today.
if I can wake them up at their desk.
they just got back from a smoke break.
they're on their second nap.
they've been arguing with the printer.
they were last seen near the vending machine.
they actually know what they're doing.
they're desperate to prove themselves.
before their next 'personal call'.
they're hovering outside the boss's office.
